are_you_ok.title: Immigrant Neighbors Skip Mutual Aid Event As ICE Fears Increase
are_you_ok.summary: ICE enforcement climate causing immigrant community to skip food pantry/aid events in Chicago; broad population affected, current sweep-related fear, check-in worthy.
are_you_ok.description: Latino immigrants did not show up to a South Side food pantry despite making up a growing population in the area. Organizers believe they are afraid because of recent fatal ICE-involved shootings.

conversation_starters.title: Goose Island’s 2026 Bourbon County Lineup Revealed
conversation_starters.summary: Goose Island reveals its 2026 Bourbon County Stout lineup — a signature Chicago beer institution with a widely-anticipated annual Black Friday release, fun and work-safe. You could open with: 'Goose Island dropped the Bourbon County lineup for the year — apparently there's a pineapple upside-down cake one.'
conversation_starters.description: The brewery's annual Black Friday release of barrel-aged stouts will make barleywine fans happy. This year's series also includes apple crisp and pineapple upside-down cake riffs.

conversation_starters.title: Wrigley Field earns Certified Autism Center designation
conversation_starters.summary: Wrigley Field becomes the first MLB park designated a Certified Autism Center — a widely-known, feel-good local landmark story, work-safe. You could open with: 'Did you hear Wrigley is the first ballpark to get certified as an autism-friendly venue?'
conversation_starters.description: Wrigley Field is now the first Major League Baseball Park to be considered a Certified Autism Center.

conversation_starters.title: Four beluga whales on way to Shedd from closed Canadian park: report
conversation_starters.summary: Novel, fun local story — belugas coming to Shedd Aquarium; a natural work-safe opener. You could open with: 'Did you hear Shedd is taking in a bunch of beluga whales from that closed Canadian park?'
conversation_starters.description: <p>Four beluga whales from a shuttered aquatic park in Niagara Falls, Canada, were on their way to Shedd Aquarium Monday as part of an “unprecedented rescue effort,” according to Canadian media.</p><p>Two more whales were headed to SeaWorld in San Antonio Monday, <a class="Link" href="https://www.winnipegfreepress.com/canada/2026/07/20/cp-newsalert-six-whales-being-moved-out-of-marineland-headed-to-u-s" target="_blank" >according to The Canadian Press</a>.</p><p>It’s the first phase of a plan to move up to 30 belugas over the next few weeks from Marineland to several American aquariums as well as to Oceanografic Valencia in Spain. Earlier this month, Shedd announced it could receive as many as 10 belugas from Marineland.</p><div class="Enhancement" data-align-center> <div class="Enhancement-item" data-crop=""> <figure class="Figure"><a class="AnchorLink" id="image-500000" name="image-500000"></a> <picture data-crop="medium"> <source type="image/webp" width="490" height="275" data-srcset="https://cst.brightspotcdn.com/dims4/default/b239233/2147483647/strip/true/crop/3564x2000+0+188/resize/490x275!/format/webp/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fchorus-production-cst-web.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com%2Fbrightspot%2Fb4%2F8e%2Ff031ac824be5a807800df78fa12b%2Fbeluga-marineland-truck-transport.jpg 1x,https://cst.brightspotcdn.com/dims4/default/5946204/2147483647/strip/true/crop/3564x2000+0+188/resize/980x550!/format/webp/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fchorus-production-cst-web.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com%2Fbrightspot%2Fb4%2F8e%2Ff031ac824be5a807800df78fa12b%2Fbeluga-marineland-truck-transport.jpg 2x" data-lazy-load="true" srcset="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIyNzVweCIgd2lkdGg9IjQ5MHB4Ij48L3N2Zz4=" /> <source width="490" height="275" data-srcset="https://cst.brightspotcdn.com/dims4/default/80a0fda/2147483647/strip/true/crop/3564x2000+0+188/resize/490x275!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fchorus-production-cst-web.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com%2Fbrightspot%2Fb4%2F8e%2Ff031ac824be5a807800df78fa12b%2Fbeluga-marineland-truck-transport.jpg" data-lazy-load="true" srcset="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIyNzVweCIgd2lkdGg9IjQ5MHB4Ij48L3N2Zz4=" /> <img class="Image" alt="One of the trucks, holding a blue water tank, in which beluga whales were to be transported from the now-closed Marineland in Niagara Falls, Canada. Several of the whales were removed from by a group of experts from Marineland and several U.S. aquariums on Monday, July 20, 2026. " srcset="https://cst.brightspotcdn.com/dims4/default/80a0fda/2147483647/strip/true/crop/3564x2000+0+188/resize/490x275!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fchorus-production-cst-web.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com%2Fbrightspot%2Fb4%2F8e%2Ff031ac824be5a807800df78fa12b%2Fbeluga-marineland-truck-transport.jpg 1x,https://cst.brightspotcdn.com/dims4/default/723f5f9/2147483647/strip/true/crop/3564x2000+0+188/resize/980x550!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fchorus-production-cst-web.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com%2Fbrightspot%2Fb4%2F8e%2Ff031ac824be5a807800df78fa12b%2Fbeluga-marineland-truck-transport.jpg 2x" width="490" height="275" data-src="https://cst.brightspotcdn.com/dims4/default/80a0fda/2147483647/strip/true/crop/3564x2000+0+188/resize/490x275!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fchorus-production-cst-web.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com%2Fbrightspot%2Fb4%2F8e%2Ff031ac824be5a807800df78fa12b%2Fbeluga-marineland-truck-transport.jpg" data-lazy-load="true" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIyNzVweCIgd2lkdGg9IjQ5MHB4Ij48L3N2Zz4=" > </picture> <div class="Figure-content"><figcaption class="Figure-caption"><p>One of the trucks, holding a blue water tank, in which beluga whales were to be transported from the now-closed Marineland in Niagara Falls, Canada. Several of the whales were removed from by a group of experts from Marineland and several U.S. aquariums on Monday.</p></figcaption><span class="line"></span><div class="Figure-credit"><p>(Carlos Osorio/The Canadian Press, distributed by the Associated Press</p></div></div> </figure> </div> </div><p>Shedd officials declined Monday to offer a timeline for when the whales would arrive at the aquarium or to confirm Canadian press reports that they were in fact on their way to Chicago.</p><p>“As reported, an initial rescue of the belugas at Marineland of Canada is under way. This is a complex rescue operation and experts are focused on the immediate safety and comfort of the animals involved. The group of accredited aquariums will share more details and updates as animals arrive safely to their new homes,” said Kayley Galassini, Shedd’s director of public relations.</p><p>The belugas headed to Shedd are named Sierra, Acadia, Osiris and Lillooet, The Canadian Press reported.</p><div class="Enhancement" data-align-center> <div class="Enhancement-item" data-crop=""> <figure class="Figure"><a class="AnchorLink" id="image-820000" name="image-820000"></a> <picture data-crop="medium"> <source type="image/webp" width="490" height="275" data-srcset="https://cst.brightspotcdn.com/dims4/default/4307523/2147483647/strip/true/crop/4623x2595+0+244/resize/490x275!/format/webp/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fchorus-production-cst-web.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com%2Fbrightspot%2F46%2F3f%2Fd8bf9f8b4232b95d59f0e82508e0%2Fbeluga-transport-tank-acadia.jpg 1x,https://cst.brightspotcdn.com/dims4/default/33b400a/2147483647/strip/true/crop/4623x2595+0+244/resize/980x550!/format/webp/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fchorus-production-cst-web.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com%2Fbrightspot%2F46%2F3f%2Fd8bf9f8b4232b95d59f0e82508e0%2Fbeluga-transport-tank-acadia.jpg 2x" data-lazy-load="true" srcset="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIyNzVweCIgd2lkdGg9IjQ5MHB4Ij48L3N2Zz4=" /> <source width="490" height="275" data-srcset="https://cst.brightspotcdn.com/dims4/default/a3a929d/2147483647/strip/true/crop/4623x2595+0+244/resize/490x275!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fchorus-production-cst-web.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com%2Fbrightspot%2F46%2F3f%2Fd8bf9f8b4232b95d59f0e82508e0%2Fbeluga-transport-tank-acadia.jpg" data-lazy-load="true" srcset="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIyNzVweCIgd2lkdGg9IjQ5MHB4Ij48L3N2Zz4=" /> <img class="Image" alt="Signs are displayed on a tank in which Beluga whale "Acadia" will be transported to the Shedd Aquarium from Marineland in Niagara Falls, Ontario. Acadia was transported from the now-shuttered Marineland on Monday, July 20, 2026. " srcset="https://cst.brightspotcdn.com/dims4/default/a3a929d/2147483647/strip/true/crop/4623x2595+0+244/resize/490x275!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fchorus-production-cst-web.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com%2Fbrightspot%2F46%2F3f%2Fd8bf9f8b4232b95d59f0e82508e0%2Fbeluga-transport-tank-acadia.jpg 1x,https://cst.brightspotcdn.com/dims4/default/35e542f/2147483647/strip/true/crop/4623x2595+0+244/resize/980x550!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fchorus-production-cst-web.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com%2Fbrightspot%2F46%2F3f%2Fd8bf9f8b4232b95d59f0e82508e0%2Fbeluga-transport-tank-acadia.jpg 2x" width="490" height="275" data-src="https://cst.brightspotcdn.com/dims4/default/a3a929d/2147483647/strip/true/crop/4623x2595+0+244/resize/490x275!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fchorus-production-cst-web.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com%2Fbrightspot%2F46%2F3f%2Fd8bf9f8b4232b95d59f0e82508e0%2Fbeluga-transport-tank-acadia.jpg" data-lazy-load="true" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIyNzVweCIgd2lkdGg9IjQ5MHB4Ij48L3N2Zz4=" > </picture> <div class="Figure-content"><figcaption class="Figure-caption"><p>Signs are displayed on a tank in which Beluga whale “Acadia” will be transported to the Shedd Aquarium from Marineland in Niagara Falls, Ontario. </p></figcaption><span class="line"></span><div class="Figure-credit"><p>Carlos Osorio/The Canadian Press, distributed by the Associated Press</p></div></div> </figure> </div> </div><p>The future of the beluga whales has been in doubt since Marineland closed to the public in 2024. Marineland has previously threatened to euthanize the sea mammals, citing a lack of funding to care for them.</p><p>In June, the Canadian government signed off on the plan to send the belugas to the American and Spanish aquariums. Earlier this month, U.S. authorities followed suit and signed off on the plan.</p><p>Twenty whales — 19 belugas and one killer whale — have died at Marineland since 2019, according to provincial government data obtained through freedom-of-information laws and official statements, the Associated Press reported.</p><p>The planned move to the aquariums is controversial, with some animal rights advocates arguing that the belugas are being exported potentially in violation of a 2019 Canadian law that bans the breeding of marine mammals in captivity.</p><div class="Enhancement" " srcset="https://cst.brightspotcdn.com/dims4/default/90ddb25/2147483647/strip/true/crop/4196x2355+0+222/resize/490x275!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fchorus-production-cst-web.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com%2Fbrightspot%2Fc2%2Ffc%2Fd3987a0746a9a5af213748c1b637%2Fbeluga-transport-wide-sierra.jpg 1x,https://cst.brightspotcdn.com/dims4/default/f8f95c4/2147483647/strip/true/crop/4196x2355+0+222/resize/980x550!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fchorus-production-cst-web.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com%2Fbrightspot%2Fc2%2Ffc%2Fd3987a0746a9a5af213748c1b637%2Fbeluga-transport-wide-sierra.jpg 2x" width="490" height="275" data-src="https://cst.brightspotcdn.com/dims4/default/90ddb25/2147483647/strip/true/crop/4196x2355+0+222/resize/490x275!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fchorus-production-cst-web.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com%2Fbrightspot%2Fc2%2Ffc%2Fd3987a0746a9a5af213748c1b637%2Fbeluga-transport-wide-sierra.jpg" data-lazy-load="true" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIyNzVweCIgd2lkdGg9IjQ5MHB4Ij48L3N2Zz4=" > </picture> <div class="Figure-content"><figcaption class="Figure-caption"><p>Beluga whale “Sierra” begins her journey from the now-closed Marineland in Niagara Falls, Canada, to Shedd Aquarium in Chicago. </p></figcaption><span class="line"></span><div class="Figure-credit"><p>Carlos Osorio/The Canadian Press, distributed by the Associated Press</p></div></div> </figure> </div> </div><p></p><p></p><p>--<br></p>

you_should_know.title: A ‘Big, Beautiful Bill’ For Landlords? Challenge To Mayor’s Housing Plan Slammed By Tenant Groups
you_should_know.summary: Competing 'landlord-friendly' challenge to the mayor's housing plan at City Council, with tenant groups warning of fewer renter protections. Political-institutional dispute landing on this metro; unsafe opener but context the reader should walk in aware of. Keep as you should know.
you_should_know.description: Ald. Gilbert Villegas defended the competing proposal as a starting point for negotiations as advocates warned it could leave some renters with fewer protections.

you_should_know.title: Lincoln Park Late-Night Bars Could Face Crackdown After ‘Shocking’ Fatal Shooting
you_should_know.summary: Fatal shooting near Lincoln Avenue bars, a second incident weeks after one wounded a woman, prompting calls for late-night bar restrictions. More than a one-off blotter item — a neighborhood-safety pattern driving a policy fight. Unsafe casual opener; keep as you should know. Borderline vs skip.
you_should_know.description: The shooting death of a 30-year-old man came just weeks after another incident left a woman wounded. That’s prompted calls for tougher restrictions on late-night bars on Lincoln Avenue.

you_should_know.title: FBI agents told to stand down on assault probes involving ICE officers; DOJ denies policy shift
you_should_know.summary: FBI reportedly told to stand down on assault probes involving ICE officers; DOJ denies a policy shift. National institutional/enforcement-apparatus story, forward-looking and partisan-sensitive — not a check-in event but climate context the reader should walk in aware of. When unsure on the context-vs-noise line, keep as you should know.
you_should_know.description: Homeland Security Investigations is an arm of ICE, meaning the immigration enforcement agency would effectively be investigating incidents involving its own agents.
